query: SELECT id, agentCode, firstName, lastName, uplineAgentId FROM agents WHERE LOWER(firstName) LIKE '%zaid%' OR LOWER(lastName) LIKE '%shopeju%' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4XhD5JGzFycvBf8.root --database iwEifGeLgtJbCVjTZgrjir --execute SELECT id, agentCode, firstName, lastName, uplineAgentId FROM agents WHERE LOWER(firstName) LIKE '%zaid%' OR LOWER(lastName) LIKE '%shopeju%' LIMIT 5;
